About Me

Curious. Creative. Driven.

I'm a passionate engineering student with a deep love for technology, problem-solving, and continuous learning. I believe in bridging the gap between academic knowledge and real-world application — one project at a time.

Beyond code, I find inspiration in the cosmos, on mountain trails, and at the drawing board. My goal is to build technology that matters — and to keep exploring every corner of this fascinating world.
